name: tken.shop
description: OpenAI-compatible API gateway offering daily random free API access with multi-model support. Designed for developers seeking easy integration with minimal setup friction.
notes: Great for developers familiar with OpenAI API format. Easy switching from OpenAI. Multi-model support available.

name: OpenRouter
description: Unified API that routes requests to multiple AI providers. Offers access to various models from a single endpoint.
notes: Good for model flexibility. Allows comparing responses across providers. Unified API simplifies multi-provider switching.

name: LocalAI
description: Self-hosted, local, RESTful API for running AI models. Drop-in replacement for OpenAI API for open-source models.
notes: Requires compatible hardware, preferably GPU. Good for privacy-sensitive applications. Full control over deployment.

name: Ollama
description: Easy-to-use tool for running open-source LLMs locally on your machine with a simple command-line interface.
notes: Excellent for local development and testing. Supports Llama 2, Mistral, and other popular open models.

name: GroqCloud
description: High-speed AI inference platform offering free tier with their LPU inference engine.
free_tier: 14,000 tokens per minute, 10,000 requests per day
notes: Known for very fast inference speeds. Good for latency-sensitive applications.

name: Cohere
description: Enterprise AI platform offering free tier for their Command and Embed models.
free_tier: Free tier with usage limits; trial credits available
notes: Strong on embeddings and specific use cases. Good documentation and SDK support.

name: AI21 Studio
description: Platform for Jurassic-2 models, offering free tier for developers.
free_tier: Free tier with monthly token allocation
notes: Jurassic-2 models known for high-quality output. Good alternative to GPT models.

name: Together AI
description: Platform for open and custom AI models with free tier access.
notes: Hosts many open-source models. Good for experimenting with different model architectures.

name: Perplexity API
description: Access to Perplexity's conversational AI models through API.
free_tier: Free tier available with rate limits
notes: Good for research-focused applications. Models trained on real-time web data.

name: Mistral AI
description: Open-source AI company offering both hosted and open-weight models.
free_tier: Free tier for their hosted API
notes: Known for efficient open-weight models. Good balance of performance and accessibility.

name: Anyscale
description: Platform for running and fine-tuning open-source models with managed infrastructure.
notes: Managed infrastructure for scaling. Good for production deployments of open models.

name: Replicate
description: Platform for running open-source models in the cloud with simple API.
notes: Easy deployment of many open-source models. Good for experimentation.

name: Example Free Tier Provider
description: Sample placeholder provider demonstrating free tier API structure.
notes: Rate limited. Good for prototyping and testing. Registration required.

name: Example Gateway Provider
description: Sample OpenAI-compatible gateway for testing integrations.
notes: Simple setup. Good for testing OpenAI API compatibility without using OpenAI credits.

name: Example Self-Hosted Demo
notes: Requires Docker setup. Full control over data and model version. Good for privacy-sensitive use cases.
